channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Inside GM’s $900M EV battery gamble
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: 'We are livid and still trying to get all the details': Google Cloud accused of suspending major customer without any warning, leading to major outage
item.description: Railway takes ownership of outage, but says “a temporary loss of service” was caused by Google Cloud “incorrectly placing our account in a suspended status.”

item.title: Xiaomi 17 vs Samsung Galaxy S26+ : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone à 1000 euros ?
item.description: Xiaomi vient jouer sur les plates bandes de Samsung avec sa dernière génération de smartphones. Le Xiaomi 17 peut-il rivaliser avec le Galaxy S26+ ? Découvrons-le ensemble dans ce nouveau comparatif.

item.title: Agentic AI solved coding — and exposed every other problem in software engineering
item.description: Agentic AI is now a core part of the engineering process, driving massive execution leverage and helping us generate more code than ever before. Yet, a difficult question I’ve increasingly heard from business leaders is: if we’re shipping code faster than ever, why aren’t our products improving at the same rate?The reason is that writing code was never the rate limiter. Defining the right requirements, integrating with complex systems, and maintaining software under real-world conditions has always been the hard part. And when agents flood an organization with lots of new code, the hard part o...

item.title: Govee’s all-weather smart lamp post is under $200 for the first time
item.description: If you have an outdoor space that needs some extra lighting, either for fun or security reasons (or a mix of the two), the Govee outdoor lamp post light is a good pick that’s 23 percent off its regular price right now. Typically retailing for $260, the Govee outdoor lamp post light is available for […]

item.title: How to watch Morocco vs Norway: FREE streams, TV channels for World Cup 2026 warm-up
item.description: All the ways to watch Morocco vs Norway live streams online – including for FREE – with Erling Haaland and Achraf Hakimi to play at Sports Illustrated Stadium.

item.title: Notée 9/10 par nos soins, la Marshall Bromley 750 est une enceinte parfaite pour les soirées d’été qui coûte 100 € de moins
item.description: Avec sa batterie amovible et ses roulettes, la Marshall Bromley est une excellente enceinte pour les soirées d'été en extérieur et, en ce moment, elle est disponible au prix de 890 euros.

item.title: L'énigme des vents cosmiques soufflés par le trou noir géant de notre Voie lactée est enfin résolue !
item.description: Nous avons bien progressé en ce qui concerne les observations et la théorie des trous noirs supermassifs au cœur des galaxies. Mais celui de notre Voie lactée déroutait les astrophysiciens depuis presque 50 ans en ce qui concerne une énigme avec des vents de matière. L'énigme semble résolue...

item.title: Japanese Gothic is a gorgeously grotesque ghost story
item.description: I'll give the usual caveat: The horror novel Japanese Gothic is best experienced going in with as little information as possible. Content warnings for graphic gore, scenes of domestic violence, self-harm, and mental illness. If you're okay with that, then consider pausing here. While I will try to keep this relatively spoiler-free, there will be […]...
